headline: Equifax Targets Rising First Party Fraud With New Verification Indicator
summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) has launched The Work Number Record Indicator to support income and employment verification for auto and personal loans. The company is highlighting recent data around a sharp rise in first party fraud in consumer credit applications. Equifax is deploying AI powered tools aimed at helping lenders address evolving fraud risks alongside this new verification feature. Equifax, through its role in credit reporting and verification services, sits at the center of how lenders...
